skill.core.leadership.description.advanc:
{Advanced Leadership}

Increases morale & attack by 2 and casts Mirth permanently
skill.core.leadership.description.basic:
{Basic Leadership}

Increases morale & attack by 1 and casts Mirth permanently
skill.core.leadership.description.expert:
{Expert Leadership}

Increases morale & attack by 3 and casts Mirth permanently
